tips_en: Start with Paper 1 (Kwai Keye-VL-2.0) as it is the most comprehensive, combining long-video understanding with agentic intelligence at scale, and it directly connects to Paper 2 (Role-Agent) through their shared focus on agentic capabilities—Paper 1's multi-stage RL for agentic tasks complements Paper 2's novel agent-environment co-evolution framework. Paper 3 (Earth-scale 3D generation) stands apart as a computer vision contribution but offers a useful contrast in scale: it tackles trillion-primitive world generation while the first two push reasoning and agency in language/multimodal domains.
tips_zh: 建议先阅读论文 1（Kwai Keye-VL-2.0），因为它最全面，融合了长视频理解与智能体能力，且与论文 2（Role-Agent）在"智能体"主题上直接呼应——论文 1 的多阶段智能体强化学习恰好与论文 2 提出的智能体-环境协同进化框架形成互补。论文 3（地球级 3D 场景生成）虽属不同方向，但提供了有趣的规模对比：它处理万亿级原语的世界生成，而前两篇则在语言/多模态领域推进推理与智能体能力。
